% Book II L4 Shell -- auto-generated by build/book_ii_l4_pilot.py
\section*{Book II Locality Structure --- L4 Generated Shell}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Book II L4 Shell}

\noindent\textit{Book II has a two-layer structure: an unconditional [U] layer and a conditional [C] layer gated by the LS-2 locality hypothesis. LS-2 is the principal conditional hinge of the NFC corpus. For canonical $K_0=7$ Phase-A substrates, LS-2 holds universally (\texttt{cor:II.ls2-universal-K07} [U]).}
